title: The History of the Mandalorians: Exploring the Evolution of a Mighty Race of Warriors

"'''The History of the Mandalorians: Exploring the Evolution of a Mighty Race of Warriors'''" is a ten-page reference article appearing in [[Star Wars Insider 80|''Star Wars Insider'' 80]]. It was written by [[Abel G. Peña]], and features many new illustrations by [[Joe Corroney]].

==Contents==
*'''History Lesson'''
*'''Behind the Masks'''
**[[Mandalore the Indomitable]]
**[[Mandalore the Ultimate]]
**[[Canderous Ordo]]
**[[Jaster Mereel]]
**[[Tor Vizsla|Vizsla]]
**[[Montross (bounty hunter)|Montross]]
**[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] and [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]
**[[Ailyn Vel]]
**[[Spar|Mandalore the Resurrector]] (aka Alpha-Ø2 or Spar)
**[[Tobbi Dala]] and [[Fenn Shysa]]
**[[Alfreda Goot]] and [[Feskitt Bobb]]
**[[Jodo Kast]]
*'''Arms and Armor'''
**[[Mandalorian armor/Legends|Mandalorian armor]]
**[[Crushgaunt/Legends|Mandalorian Crushgaunts]]
**[[Mythosaur axe/Legends|Mythosaur Axe]]
**[[Mandalorian manacles|Mandalorian Manacles]]
**[[Beskar/Legends|Mandalorian Iron]]
**[[BL-series Battle Legionnaire|Battle Legionnaire (BL-Series) Droid]]
**[[Wing-Blast rocket pack]]
*'''Chariots of War'''
**[[MandalMotors/Legends|MandalMotors]]
**[[Mandalorian dungeon ship|Mandalorian Dungeon Ship]]
**[[Pursuer-class enforcement ship|Pursuer Enforcement Ship]]
**[[Meteor-class Q-Carrier|Mandalorian Drop Ship]]
**[[Gladiator-class assault fighter|Gladiator Assault Fighter]]
**[[Basilisk war droid/Legends|Basilisk War Droids]]
**[[Mandalorian battle harness/Legends|Mandalorian Battle Harness]]
**[[Basiliskan|Lagartoz War Dragons]]
